◎译　　名　吃掉那个问题

◎年　　代　2016
◎产　　地　法国 / 德国

◎简　　介  

　　This entertaining encounter with the premier of sonic avant-garde is acidic, fun-poking, and full of rich and rare archival footage. This documentary bashes favorite Zappa targets and dashes a few myths about the man himself. World Premiere
